message:
fix(fsci-special): resolve Clippy lints in test helpers and log call sites

Remove unnecessary `&` (borrow) prefixes from 16 `format!(...)` call
sites where the result is passed to `test_log_json`. The function
signature accepts `impl Into<String>`, so passing an owned `String`
directly is more idiomatic and avoids a redundant borrow-then-clone
cycle. Affected test functions:

  - test_erf_plus_erfc_equals_one (2 sites)
  - test_gamma_integer_factorial (2 sites)
  - test_incomplete_gamma_complement (1 site)
  - test_beta_symmetry (1 site)
  - test_bessel_asymptotic_envelope (3 sites)
  - prop_erf_erfc_sum (2 sites)
  - prop_gamma_recurrence (3 sites)
  - prop_beta_symmetry (1 site)
  - prop_erfinv_roundtrip (3 sites)
  - prop_gammainc_complement (2 sites)

Additionally, add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]` to the
`test_log_json` helper function to suppress the Clippy
`too_many_arguments` warning. The function genuinely needs all its
parameters (test_id, function, input, expected, actual, tolerance,
mode, seed) to produce structured JSON test logs, and splitting it
into a builder or config struct would add complexity without benefit
in a test-only helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -388,9 +388,9 @@ mod tests {
             push_test_log(test_log_json(
                 "error-erf-plus-erfc",
                 "erf_erfc_identity",
-                &format!("x={x}"),
+                format!("x={x}"),
                 "1",
-                &format!("{lhs:.16e}"),
+                format!("{lhs:.16e}"),
                 2.0e-7,
                 mode,
                 seed,
@@ -423,8 +423,8 @@ mod tests {

                 "gamma-integer-factorial",
                 "gamma",

-                &format!("{expected}"),
+                format!("x={n}"),
+                format!("{expected}"),
                 scalar_to_string(&actual),
                 1e-9,
                 mode,
@@ -492,7 +492,7 @@ mod tests {

             2.0e-12,
             mode,
             seed,

                 scalar_to_string(&beta_left),
                 scalar_to_string(&beta_right)
@@ -621,9 +621,9 @@ mod tests {

+    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
     fn test_log_json(
         test_id: impl Into<String>,
         function: impl Into<String>,
